steps.prompt: Write an initial draft of {deliverable}. Context: {context}. Focus on completeness and structure. Cover all essential sections, use clear language, and ensure logical flow. Produce a polished first draft that is ready for critical review.

Improve the draft at draft.md based on the critic's feedback. Address all identified issues: fix factual errors, strengthen weak arguments, improve clarity, fill content gaps, and polish the prose. Produce a revised version that resolves every critique point.

checkpoint_config.message: Review refined.md. The deliverable has been through up to 3 rounds of critique and revision. Approve to finalize.
